name: wa_stale_ins_revive
drl: rule W when accumulate( E($v : val) over window:time(100ms); $c : sum($v) ) then end
_finding: CEP A2 windowed-accumulate (D-154/D-155): the REJECTED insert still creates the WindowNode RightTuple (created BEFORE behavior.assertFact), so a later mask-hit update REVIVES it (sum 20) — rejection is not a permanent block.
